user.title: Add a Room
user.description: Configure Predictive Heating for a room. Rooms sharing the same climate entity are automatically grouped into a heating zone.

data_description.climate_entity: The thermostat that controls this room. If multiple rooms use the same thermostat, they will be grouped into a zone automatically.
data_description.opentherm_enabled: Enable if your thermostat supports OpenTherm. This allows flow temperature modulation for better efficiency.
data_description.opentherm_flow_temp_number: The number entity that controls the boiler flow/water temperature (from OpenTherm Gateway or similar integration).

data_description.max_setpoint_delta: How many degrees above target the thermostat setpoint can go. Lower = gentler heating, less overshoot. Default 2.5°C.
data_description.min_flow_temp: Lowest boiler water temperature. Lower = higher heat pump COP but slower heating.
data_description.max_flow_temp: Highest boiler water temperature. Used when room is far below target.
